title: scan_secrets
description: Scan text content for accidentally exposed secrets — API keys, tokens, passwords, private keys, connection strings. Uses pattern matching for common secret formats (AWS, GitHub, JWT, PEM, etc.).

content.description: Text content to scan for exposed secrets

redact.description: If true, return a redacted version of the content with secrets masked

patterns.description: Additional regex patterns to check beyond the defaults. Each pattern should have a capture group for the secret value.
